dimensions.name: Platform Dependency
dimensions.question: How exposed are you to a single platform's decisions?

dimensions.name: Customer Ownership
dimensions.question: Do you own the relationship with your buyer — or does the marketplace?

dimensions.name: Reputation Portability
dimensions.question: Are your reviews, ratings, and trading history portable — or hostage?

dimensions.name: Payment & Settlement Exposure
dimensions.question: How many settlement rails do you control?

dimensions.name: Fee & Margin Leakage
dimensions.question: How much of your margin funds intermediaries on the route to the buyer?

dimensions.name: Cross-Border Trust
dimensions.question: Can a foreign buyer trust you without a platform vouching for you?

dimensions.name: AI Commerce Readiness
dimensions.question: Can an AI buying agent find, parse, and trust your commerce?

dimensions.name: Governance Independence
dimensions.question: Who writes the rules of your commerce?
